name: Ghivetch
recipeIngredient: 2 medium Baking potatoes - peeled and diced
1/4 lb Fresh green beans - sliced diagonally into 1/2 inch pieces
1 Celery stalk - sliced diagonally into 1/4 inch pieces
1 small Sweet red pepper - cut in strips
1 small Green pepper; cut in strips
recipeInstructions:
Slice beans diagonally into 1/2 inch pieces.
Slice celery diagonally into 1/4 inch pieces.
Combine first 11 ingredients in a large bowl; toss well. Spoon vegetable mixture into a deep 5-quart casserole; set aside.
Combine broth and remaining ingredients in a saucepan; bring mixture to a boil. Pour over vegetables. Cover and bake at 350°F for 1 hour, or until vegetables are tender, stirring occasionally. Remove and discard bay leaf before serving.
Yield: 8 to 10 servings.
